product: Serverless outbound IPs available through public JSON endpoint (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now retrieve serverless outbound IP addresses from a public JSON endpoint.
what_it_does: You can now retrieve serverless outbound IP addresses from a public JSON endpoint. This replaces the existing stable IPs shared with customers enrolled in the Public Preview. Databricks serverless compute connects to your cloud resources through managed network infrastructure.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now retrieve serverless outbound IP addresses from a public JSON endpoint. This replaces the existing stable IPs shared with customers enrolled in the Public Preview.
key_takeaway: You can now retrieve serverless outbound IP addresses from a public JSON endpoint.
